title: Add user credit transfer and user-provided OpenAI API key billing option
notes:
Suggestion #17 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-23). Requested scope: (1) allow users with positive credit to transfer part of their balance to another user; negative transfer amounts are forbidden and transfer workflow should include validation/confirmation/abuse safeguards. (2) allow users to register an OpenAI API key and choose to bill C-LARA-2 AI operations to that key (BYOK billing path). These capabilities existed in C-LARA and should be restored in C-LARA-2. Track this issue in tandem with docs/roadmap/credits-and-billing.md, with explicit cross-references.

Priority downgraded to P2 on 2026-05-23 after delivery/validation of urgent user-to-user credit transfer functionality needed for Sophie's Kok Kaper visit support.
